maml:description.maml:para: Establishes an authenticated session with the ServiceDesk Plus Cloud API.
Obtains an OAuth2 access token via the client credentials flow and stores the session in module scope for use by all other functions.
The Zoho/ManageEngine data center region for your portal. Automatically resolves both the API base URI and the Zoho accounts domain.
The portal identifier that appears in your SDP Cloud URL (e.g. 'itdesk' from sdpondemand.manageengine.com/app/itdesk).
OAuth2 client ID from the Zoho Developer Console.
OAuth2 client secret as a SecureString.
Returns the SDPConnection object after connecting.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Full base URI including the portal path for custom or vanity domains (e.g. 'https://helpdesk.example.com/app/myportal').
Zoho accounts domain used for token requests when using a custom URI (e.g. 'https://accounts.zoho.com').
OAuth2 client ID from the Zoho Developer Console.
OAuth2 client secret as a SecureString.
Returns the SDPConnection object after connecting.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The Zoho/ManageEngine data center region for your portal. Automatically resolves both the API base URI and the Zoho accounts domain.
The portal identifier that appears in your SDP Cloud URL (e.g. 'itdesk' from sdpondemand.manageengine.com/app/itdesk).
Full base URI including the portal path for custom or vanity domains (e.g. 'https://helpdesk.example.com/app/myportal').
Zoho accounts domain used for token requests when using a custom URI (e.g. 'https://accounts.zoho.com').
OAuth2 client ID from the Zoho Developer Console.
OAuth2 client secret as a SecureString.
Returns the SDPConnection object after connecting.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Clears the active ServiceDesk Plus Cloud session from module scope.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves one or more ServiceDesk Plus Cloud requests.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of a single request to retrieve. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Number of requests to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Field name to sort results by. Default 'created_time'.
Sort direction. Default 'desc'.
Array of search criteria hashtables. Each hashtable should contain 'field', 'condition', and 'value' keys matching the SDP API search_criteria schema.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of a single request to retrieve. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of requests to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Field name to sort results by. Default 'created_time'.
Sort direction. Default 'desc'.
Array of search criteria hashtables. Each hashtable should contain 'field', 'condition', and 'value' keys matching the SDP API search_criteria schema.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves approvals within an approval level for a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent approval level. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single approval to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent approval level. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of approvals to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent approval level. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single approval to retrieve.
Number of approvals to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves approval levels for a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single approval level to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of approval levels to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single approval level to retrieve.
Number of approval levels to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.

Retrieves notes for a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single note to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of notes to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single note to retrieve.
Number of notes to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves tasks associated with a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single task to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of tasks to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single task to retrieve.
Number of tasks to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves worklogs for a task on a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent task. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single worklog to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent task. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of worklogs to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent task. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single worklog to retrieve.
Number of worklogs to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Retrieves worklogs for a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of a single worklog to retrieve.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Number of worklogs to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.

The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.

Number of worklogs to return per page. Maximum 100. Default 100.
1-based index of the first record to return. Default 1.
Automatically paginate through all results and emit every record.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Creates a new ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The subject line of the request. Required.
Display name of the category.
Display name of the subcategory.
Display name of the item.
Display name of the request type (e.g. 'Incident', 'Service Request').
Display name of the site.
Display name of the department.
Due date and time for the request.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the request body, including UDF fields.
The detailed description of the request.
Display name of the requester.
Display name of the assigned technician.
Display name of the assigned group.
Display name of the status (e.g. 'Open').
Display name of the priority (e.g. 'High').
Display name of the urgency.
Display name of the impact.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The subject line of the request. Required.
The detailed description of the request.
Display name of the requester.
Display name of the assigned technician.
Display name of the assigned group.
Display name of the status (e.g. 'Open').
Display name of the priority (e.g. 'High').
Display name of the urgency.
Display name of the impact.
Display name of the category.
Display name of the subcategory.
Display name of the item.
Display name of the request type (e.g. 'Incident', 'Service Request').
Display name of the site.
Display name of the department.
Due date and time for the request.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the request body, including UDF fields.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Adds an approver to an approval level on a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent approval level. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Display name of the approver.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the approval body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent approval level. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Display name of the approver.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the approval body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Adds an approval level to a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Hashtable of fields for the approval level body (e.g. approver names, level number).
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Hashtable of fields for the approval level body (e.g. approver names, level number).
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Adds a note to a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The note content. Required.
When true the note is visible to requesters. Default false.
When true an email notification is sent to the assigned technician. Default false.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the note body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The note content. Required.
When true the note is visible to requesters. Default false.
When true an email notification is sent to the assigned technician. Default false.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the note body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Creates a new task on a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the task body.
The title of the task. Required.
The detailed description of the task.
Display name of the task status.
Display name of the task owner.
Display name of the technician the task is assigned to.
Completion percentage (0-100).
Planned start date and time.
Planned end date and time.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The title of the task. Required.
The detailed description of the task.
Display name of the task status.
Display name of the task owner.
Display name of the technician the task is assigned to.
Completion percentage (0-100).
Planned start date and time.
Planned end date and time.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the task body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Adds a worklog entry to a task on a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the worklog body.
The numeric ID of the parent task. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Description of the work performed. Required.
Display name of the technician who performed the work.
Display name of the worklog type.
Start date and time of the work.
End date and time of the work.
Time spent in minutes.
When true the worklog is visible to requesters. Default false.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the parent request. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
The numeric ID of the parent task. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Description of the work performed. Required.
Display name of the technician who performed the work.
Display name of the worklog type.
Start date and time of the work.
End date and time of the work.
Time spent in minutes.
When true the worklog is visible to requesters. Default false.
Hashtable of any additional fields to include in the worklog body.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Adds a worklog entry to a ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.

{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
Updates an existing ServiceDesk Plus Cloud request.
{{ Fill in the Description }}
The numeric ID of the request to update. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Display name of the new impact.
Display name of the new category.
Display name of the new subcategory.
Display name of the new item.
Display name of the new request type.
Display name of the new site.
Display name of the new department.
Updated due date and time.
Hashtable of any additional fields to update, including UDF fields.
Updated subject line.
Updated description.
Display name of the new requester.
Display name of the new assigned technician.
Display name of the new assigned group.
Display name of the new status.
Display name of the new priority.
Display name of the new urgency.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
The numeric ID of the request to update. Accepts pipeline input by property name.
Updated subject line.
Updated description.
Display name of the new requester.

Display name of the new status.
Display name of the new priority.
Display name of the new urgency.
Display name of the new impact.
Display name of the new category.
Display name of the new subcategory.
Display name of the new item.
Display name of the new request type.
Display name of the new site.
Display name of the new department.
Updated due date and time.
Hashtable of any additional fields to update, including UDF fields.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

{{ Fill ProgressAction Description }}
